flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Rosedale Technical College fell 23% between 2006 and 2009 (69.6% → 53.6%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rosedale Technical College rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 ($9.8k → $11.6k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Rosedale Technical College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (93.3% → 82.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rosedale Technical College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.7k → $17.4k).
